overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Legend of Zelda showing the character Link traversing a snowy mountain environment at night. The character walks through rocky passages, ascends slopes, and explores a snow-covered forest with light snowfall and atmospheric fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon passage with snow

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow snow-covered canyon between tall rock walls

entered.detail: tall dark rock wall covered in snow and ice formations
large boulder and rock formation with snow accumulation
snowy ground with visible footprints and patches of exposed stone
snow-covered mountain visible through the canyon opening

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow enclosed canyon with snow-covered ground, flanked by tall rock walls on both sides. The path leads toward a distant snow-covered mountain peak visible through the canyon exit.

events.description: exits the narrow rocky canyon into open mountain slope
character begins running up the steep snowy incline

agents.ego_description: climbing up the snowy mountain slope, transitioning from walking to running

entered.detail: steep incline covered in deep snow with wind-blown drifts
distant structure emitting teal-green glow visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Exiting the canyon, the character ascends a wide-open snowy mountainside under a starry night sky. A glowing shrine structure becomes visible in the distance as the character runs up the steep slope.

events.description: character stops at summit and pans camera to survey the landscape
character resumes moving down the slope into the forested area

agents.ego_description: pausing at the mountain summit to pan the camera and survey the snowy landscape before continuing

entered.detail: flat rocky outcrop at the peak covered in snow
tall pine tree covered in snow on the hillside
clear night sky filled with visible stars and light snowfall

segments.scene_description: At the mountain summit, the character pauses to pan the camera across the panoramic view of the snowy landscape under a starry sky. A glowing shrine is visible in the distance as snow falls gently, before the character proceeds down into a forested area.

events.description: enters the forested area with dense snow-covered pine trees

agents.ego_description: running through the snowy forest path surrounded by snow-laden pine trees

entered.detail: dense cluster of snow-covered pine trees lining the path
large boulder formation partially covered in snow

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a snow-covered forest trail surrounded by dense pine trees laden with snow. The path winds through the trees with large rock formations visible in the background as the character continues through the wintry landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a confined rocky canyon into a vast, starry mountain summit and finally down into a dense wintry forest. It begins with the character walking through a narrow enclosed canyon flanked by tall rock walls, moving steadily toward a distant snow-covered peak. As the character exits the canyon, the environment opens up into a wide-open mountainside under a starry night sky, with the camera ascending a steep slope toward a glowing shrine in the distance. Upon reaching the summit, the view expands into a panoramic vista of the snowy landscape before the camera turns and descends into a forested area. The scene finally winds through a snow-covered trail surrounded by dense, snow-laden pine trees and large rock formations.
